note: Musée d'Art Moderne de Paris (MAM). Hand-maintained capture fixture (French-language site). Refresh each season from mam.paris.fr. Future-opening only.

items.title: Florian Krewer: woven thin
items.description: First solo exhibition in France for the German painter — sixteen recent monumental canvases, some previously unseen. Free entry in the collections

items.title: Kerry James Marshall: The Histories
items.description: First French exhibition devoted to Marshall — ~70 works including eight new paintings made for the show. Organized with the Royal Academy and Kunsthaus Zürich

items.title: Simone Fattal: Des villes au fond d'un lac
items.description: Major show of the Lebanese-American artist — ~100 works over 50+ years, from landscape painting to ceramics and collages
